title: A reaction only rearranges atoms — count Before and After and they always match
todo: Finish atoms_of(num, each) to count the atoms, then check Before and After are equal.

stages.label: Before
stages.caption: ⚗️ Before: 2 hydrogen molecules + 1 oxygen molecule. Count them — 4 white H and 2 red O.

stages.label: After
stages.caption: 💧 After: 2 water molecules. Still 4 white H and 2 red O — nothing vanished, it just rearranged!
